/usr/bin/cc -flto -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/font_face_test.dir/font_face_test.c.o -o font_face_test  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/src:/app/build/contrib/libcss:/app/build/contrib/libnsgif:/app/build/contrib/libnsbmp:/app/build/contrib/libsvgtiny:/app/build/contrib/libdom:/app/build/contrib/libhubbub:/app/build/contrib/libparserutils:/app/build/contrib/libnsutils:/app/build/contrib/quickjs-ng ../libwisp.so.1 ../../contrib/libcss/libcss.so.1 ../../contrib/libnsgif/libnsgif.so.1 ../../contrib/libnsbmp/libnsbmp.so.1 ../../contrib/libsvgtiny/libsvgtiny.so.1 ../../contrib/libdom/libdom.so.1 ../../contrib/libhubbub/libhubbub.so.1 ../../contrib/libparserutils/libparserutils.so.1 -lxml2 ../../contrib/libnsutils/libnsutils.so.1 -lcrypto -lpng16 -lcurl -ljpeg -lwebp -lavif -lpsl -lz -lssl -lutf8proc ../../contrib/quickjs-ng/libqjs.so.0.11.0 -ldl -lm
